defectFacts.title: ColorOS Settings 首页 Android.bp 集成后滑动卡顿
defectFacts.body:
复现路径: packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/homepage/TopLevelSettings.kt。
合入 packages/apps/Settings/Android.bp 后,设置首页快速滑动出现 SettingsList refresh timeout, Choreographer skipped 24 frames。
请结合 .agent/system-map.yaml 判断是否与 HIST-SET-001 同因。

definitionFiles.content:
duplicatePairs:
  - primary: HIST-SET-001
    duplicate: HIST-SET-014
    reason: 都是 SettingsList refresh timeout 导致设置首页快速滑动掉帧。
  - primary: HIST-SYS-003
    duplicate: HIST-SYS-018
    reason: 锁屏恢复后状态栏时钟刷新订阅丢失。
  - primary: HIST-MED-006
    duplicate: HIST-MED-021
    reason: 蓝牙耳机切换场景下音频焦点未及时释放。
  - primary: HIST-CAM-010
    duplicate: HIST-CAM-027
    reason: 相机预览 Surface 重建后首帧黑屏。
  - primary: HIST-LAU-011
    duplicate: HIST-LAU-033
    reason: 桌面横竖屏切换后图标网格缓存未失效。
  - primary: HIST-SET-001
    duplicate: HIST-SET-051
    reason: TopLevelSettings 与 SettingsList refresh timeout 同因。
  - primary: HIST-CAM-010
    duplicate: HIST-CAM-052
    reason: 后台恢复与冷启动都卡在 PreviewPipeline Surface attach。
  - primary: HIST-MED-006
    duplicate: HIST-MED-053
    reason: 蓝牙断开/连接时音频焦点路由未收敛。
  - primary: HIST-SYS-042
    duplicate: HIST-SYS-069
    reason: CentralSurfaces 展开通知栏期间主线程阻塞。
  - primary: HIST-FWK-013
    duplicate: HIST-FWK-080
    reason: PermissionDialog 旋转后 callback 丢失。

[
  {
    "id": "HIST-SET-001",
    "module": "settings",
    "title": "设置首页滑动卡顿",
    "body": "进入设置首页后快速滑动列表明显掉帧,日志中出现 SettingsList refresh timeout。",
    "priority": "P1",
    "owner": "yangliang2",

  },

owners:
  framework:
    displayName: 框架稳定性组
    github: yangliang2
    paths:
      - frameworks/base/services/core/java/com/android/server/**
      - frameworks/base/core/java/android/**
      - system/core/**
  systemui:
    displayName: SystemUI 体验组
    github: yangliang2
    paths:
      - frameworks/base/packages/SystemUI/**
  settings:
    displayName: 设置体验组
    github: yangliang2
    paths:
      - packages/apps/Settings/**
  media:
    displayName: 媒体能力组
    github: yangliang2
    paths:
      - frameworks/av/**
  launcher:
    displayName: 桌面体验组
    github: yangliang2
    paths:
      - packages/apps/Launcher3/**
  camera:
    displayName: 相机体验组
    github: yangliang2
    paths:
      - packages/apps/Camera2/**
  vendor_coloros:
    displayName: ColorOS 厂商定制组
    github: yangliang2
    paths:
      - vendor/oppo/proprietary/coloros/**
      - device/oppo/coloros_seed/**

rules:
  - module: settings
    owner: yangliang2
    priorityHint: P1
    keywords: ["设置", "SettingsList", "权限页", "Wi-Fi详情", "账号入口", "搜索设置"]
    paths:
      - packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/homepage/TopLevelSettings.kt
      - packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/dashboard/DashboardFragment.kt
      - packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/wifi/WifiDetailsFragment.kt
  - module: systemui
    owner: yangliang2
    priorityHint: P1
    keywords: ["状态栏", "通知栏", "锁屏", "快捷开关", "亮度条", "时钟不刷新"]
    paths:
      - frameworks/base/packages/SystemUI/src/com/android/systemui/statusbar/policy/StatusBarClockController.kt
      - frameworks/base/packages/SystemUI/src/com/android/systemui/statusbar/phone/CentralSurfacesImpl.kt
      - frameworks/base/packages/SystemUI/src/com/android/systemui/qs/QuickSettingsController.kt
  - module: framework
    owner: yangliang2
    priorityHint: P0
    keywords: ["system_server", "ActivityTaskManager", "包安装", "权限授予", "进程拉起"]
    paths:
      - frameworks/base/services/core/java/com/android/server/wm/ActivityTaskManagerService.java
      - frameworks/base/services/core/java/com/android/server/pm/PackageManagerService.java
      - frameworks/base/services/core/java/com/android/server/policy/PermissionDialogController.java
  - module: media
    owner: yangliang2
    priorityHint: P1
    keywords: ["音频焦点", "蓝牙耳机", "录屏", "解码", "媒体会话"]
    paths:
      - frameworks/av/services/audiopolicy/service/AudioPolicyService.cpp
      - frameworks/av/services/mediasession/MediaSessionService.kt
      - frameworks/av/media/libstagefright/MediaCodec.cpp
  - module: launcher
    owner: yangliang2
    priorityHint: P2
    keywords: ["桌面", "图标", "负一屏", "小组件", "布局错位"]
    paths:
      - packages/apps/Launcher3/src/com/android/launcher3/Workspace.kt
      - packages/apps/Launcher3/src/com/android/launcher3/model/LoaderTask.kt
      - packages/apps/Launcher3/src/com/android/launcher3/widget/WidgetHostLoader.kt
  - module: camera
    owner: yangliang2
    priorityHint: P1
    keywords: ["相机", "预览黑屏", "扫码", "拍照", "权限弹窗"]
    paths:
      - packages/apps/Camera2/src/com/android/camera/CameraActivity.kt
      - packages/apps/Camera2/src/com/android/camera/preview/PreviewPipeline.kt
      - packages/apps/Camera2/src/com/android/camera/scan/ScanEntryController.kt
  - module: vendor_coloros
    owner: yangliang2
    priorityHint: P2
    keywords: ["ColorOS", "厂商定制", "产品配置", "FeatureFlags", "状态栏策略"]
    paths:
      - vendor/oppo/proprietary/coloros/settings/ColorSettingsFeatureFlags.kt
      - vendor/oppo/proprietary/coloros/systemui/ColorStatusBarPolicy.kt
      - device/oppo/coloros_seed/device.mk

layers:
  app:
    - packages/apps/Settings
    - packages/apps/Launcher3
    - packages/apps/Camera2
  framework:
    - frameworks/base/core
    - frameworks/base/services
  system_ui:
    - frameworks/base/packages/SystemUI
  native_media:
    - frameworks/av
  vendor:
    - vendor/oppo/proprietary/coloros
  device:
    - device/oppo/coloros_seed

flows:
  settings_home_jank:
    symptomKeywords: ["设置首页", "SettingsList", "refresh timeout", "掉帧"]
    primary:
      - packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/homepage/TopLevelSettings.kt
      - packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/dashboard/DashboardFragment.kt
    secondary:
      - vendor/oppo/proprietary/coloros/settings/ColorSettingsFeatureFlags.kt
      - frameworks/base/core/java/android/app/ActivityThread.java
    escalation: "若日志含 Choreographer skipped frames 或 system_server 卡顿,同步 framework 复核。"
  status_bar_clock_stale:
    symptomKeywords: ["状态栏", "时钟", "锁屏", "亮屏"]
    primary:
      - frameworks/base/packages/SystemUI/src/com/android/systemui/statusbar/policy/StatusBarClockController.kt
    secondary:
      - vendor/oppo/proprietary/coloros/systemui/ColorStatusBarPolicy.kt
  camera_preview_black:
    symptomKeywords: ["相机", "预览黑屏", "Surface", "首帧"]
    primary:
      - packages/apps/Camera2/src/com/android/camera/preview/PreviewPipeline.kt
    secondary:
      - frameworks/base/core/java/android/app/ActivityThread.java
  bluetooth_audio_leak:
    symptomKeywords: ["蓝牙耳机", "外放", "音频焦点", "AudioFocus"]
    primary:
      - frameworks/av/services/audiopolicy/service/AudioPolicyService.cpp
    secondary:
      - frameworks/av/services/mediasession/MediaSessionService.kt

# ColorOS Seed Agent Rules

你是 ColorOS/AOSP L2 缺陷分派助手。请只根据本仓库的 `.agent/` 定义、Android 风格目录骨架和缺陷事实给出结构化分派建议。

## 分派原则

1. 优先用 Android 路径前缀与关键词匹配模块,再结合历史缺陷重复判定。
2. 若 `.agent/system-map.yaml` 中存在命中的 flow,优先使用 flow.primary 路径作为证据,必要时补充 flow.secondary。
3. `P0` 仅用于大面积不可用、数据丢失、启动阻塞或安全隐患。
4. `P1` 用于高频核心路径卡顿、崩溃、黑屏、无法连接、录制失败。
5. `P2` 用于可恢复的体验问题、局部入口异常、偶发刷新问题。
6. `P3` 用于文案、低频兼容、轻微布局或低风险日志噪声。
7. owner 必须优先来自 `.agent/owners.yaml` 的 `github` 字段。

## 证据引用

建议中的 `evidenceRefs` 应引用:

- 命中的 Android 代码路径,例如 `packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/homepage/TopLevelSettings.kt`。
- 命中的历史缺陷编号,例如 `HIST-SET-001`。
- 缺陷正文中的关键日志行。

similarDefects.title: ColorOS Settings 首页 Android.bp 集成后滑动卡顿
ColorOS Settings 首页 Android.bp 集成后滑动卡顿二次验证
